summary: Patched the StackOverflow answer lane so an exhausted handoff packet URL is retired for the current review window, then tightened search queries toward high-intent AI workflow questions instead of broad generic workflow matches.

runtime_outcome.lane_result: no fresh placement-ready StackOverflow draft found; no fake progress logged

expected_outcome: Future StackOverflow demand-capture runs stop looping on the exhausted reliability packet and either surface a genuinely new high-intent question or truthfully return no fresh candidate.

measurement_window.success_metric: A fresh StackOverflow draft or a truthfully empty high-intent result without duplicate packet churn.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If this tighter search still yields no new placement-ready opportunities by review, retire StackOverflow as the active high-intent lane and shift the slot to a different executable demand-capture surface.
